name: Hidden Valley Hot Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. After cooking and while still warm, cut the potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
2. Gently toss together the potatoes, onions, and salad dressing in a bowl.
3. Dust with paprika or pepper to taste.
4. Garnish with fresh chives.
5. Serve warm or at room temperature.
